description:
Changes the lightnings value smoothly during the given time (in seconds). A time of zero means there will be an immediate change.

'''NOTE''': This command will have no effect (even though the value of [[lightnings]] changes) unless {{hl|Manual Override}} option is selected in the editor in the Intel, which is normally off.

[[File:setLightnings.jpg|left|600px]]
name: setLightnings
